purpose: Route structured reasoning requests to integrated reasoning with optional reality-check or scenario-planning templates.
selection_order: Integrated reasoning for any analytical need.
Quick-start templates (reality-check / scenario-planning) are reference files within reasoning, not separate children.

children.name: reasoning
children.summary: Integrated 5-phase reasoning workflow: calibrate state (0), frame problem (1), analyze with lenses (2), recommend with evidence (3), verify before acting (4). Run only the needed phases. Includes quick-start templates for reality checks (references/archetypes.md) and scenario planning (references/scenarios.md).
route_when: The situation needs any combination of state calibration, problem framing, multi-lens analysis, structured advisory, or verification.
Multiple needs are present — state check, then problem definition, then analysis, then recommendation, then verification.
The user needs a survivability audit (reality check) or scenario planning (strategic foresight) — use quick-start templates from references/.
avoid_when: The request is purely factual or operational with no analytical dimension.

install_if_missing.notes: Install this nested child path before routing when the runtime cannot discover reasoning children automatically.
